Phase-12.NAME: Infrastructure Hardening (P4)
Phase-12.goal: Improve deploy reliability, add backup/restore, harden docker and nginx.
Phase-12.step-1: M-012: Fix deploy idempotency — preserve WG keys.
Phase-12.step-3: M-012: Add healthchecks for nginx, frontend, frontend-admin.
Phase-12.step-4: M-012: Add resource limits to all docker-compose containers.
Phase-12.step-5: M-012: Replace hardcoded eth0 with dynamic interface detection.
Phase-12.step-6: M-012: Add security headers to nginx (HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options).
Phase-12.step-7: M-012: Add rate limiting to nginx.
Phase-12.step-8: M-012: Add deploy/backup-db.sh for pg_dump with 7-backup retention.
Phase-12.step-9: M-012: Restrict UFW FORWARD to deny + explicit AWG rules.
Phase-12.step-10: M-012: Verify no eval injection in install.sh.
